title: Knowledge-Enhanced Generation Path
description: Build fluency in Knowledge-Enhanced Generation inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: ANIL (Almost No Inner Loop)
